description: Composition White knitted pant made of ComfortSoft 100% combed cotton, has light blue side panel piping, elasticated waistband covered with a ComfortSoft fabric and a drawstring, and side pockets Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Stylish and sporty jersey pants that can be worn on a relaxed day at home or during a vacation, this product from hanes is created keeping your comfort in mind. The luxurious cotton fabric not only retains its shape even after repeated washes, but also offers superior comfort. And with the ComfortSoft fabric covering the elasticated waistband, be assured of a pinch-free comfortable fit, while you can further customise the fitting with the drawstring. Wear this with Sports t-shirts or casual ones and revel in a comfortable lifestyle. Model statistics The model wears size M in knitted pants that has a length of 94 cm Height: 5'8", Waist: 26", Hips: 35"
